creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: beech
Date: Fri Mar 22 23:18:27 2013
New Revision: 314974
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/314974

Log:
  - Convert to OptionsNG
  - Fix docs
  - Bump portrevision
  
  PR:		ports/177171
  Submitted by:	nemysis <nemysis@gmx.ch>

Modified:
  head/graphics/libwmf/Makefile
  head/graphics/libwmf/pkg-plist

Modified: head/graphics/libwmf/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/graphics/libwmf/Makefile	Fri Mar 22 23:00:58 2013	(r314973)
+++ head/graphics/libwmf/Makefile	Fri Mar 22 23:18:27 2013	(r314974)
@@ -3,17 +3,19 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	libwmf
 PORTVERSION=	0.2.8.4
-PORTREVISION=	9
+PORTREVISION=	10
 CATEGORIES=	graphics
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/wvware/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Tools and library for converting Microsoft WMF (windows metafile)
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	freetype-config:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2     # XXX
-LIB_DEPENDS=	jpeg.11:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/jpeg \
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	freetype-config:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2
+LIB_DEPENDS=	jpeg:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/jpeg \
 		png15:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/png \
-		freetype.9:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2
+		freetype:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2
 
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool
 USE_GNOME=	libxml2
@@ -22,18 +24,24 @@ CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-sys-gd=no \
 		--with-png=${LOCALBASE} --with-jpeg=${LOCALBASE} \
 		--with-gsfontdir=${LOCALBASE}/share/ghostscript/fonts
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
-
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
-.if defined(WITHOUT_X11)
+PORTDOCS=	*
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	X11
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	X11
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MX11}
+USE_XORG=	x11
+PLIST_SUB+=	X11=""
+CONFLICTS+=	libwmf-nox11-0.*
+.else
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-nox11
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-x=no
-PLIST_SUB+=	X11='@comment '
+PLIST_SUB+=	X11="@comment "
 CONFLICTS+=	libwmf-0.*
-.else
-USE_XORG=	x11
-PLIST_SUB+=	X11=''
-CONFLICTS+=	libwmf-nox11-0.*
 .endif
 
 post-patch:
@@ -46,12 +54,11 @@ post-patch:
 		 s|: install-loaderLTLIBRARIES|:|g' ${WRKSRC}/src/Makefile.in
 
 post-install:
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${TAR} -C ${WRKSRC}/doc --exclude '*Makefile*' -cf - . | \
+	@${TAR} -C ${WRKSRC}/doc --exclude '*Makefile*' -cf - . | \
 		${TAR} -C ${DOCSDIR} --unlink -xf -
 	@${CHOWN} -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGROUP} ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
-

==============================================================================
